dailyNews.title: Trump slams Bruce Springsteen, calls singer a ‘dried up prune’ who suffers from 'Trump Derangement Syndrome'
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump criticised singer Bruce Springsteen, calling him a ‘dried up prune.’ The remarks came after Springsteen, a longtime Trump critic, used his 2026 ‘Land of Hope and Dreams American Tour’ to slam the Trump administration.

dailyNews.title: AI Frenzy To War Jolt: How Wall Street Fared In Year After 'Liberation Day' Tariff Shock

dailyNews.title: Texas killing fields case: Arrest of 61 year old man marks breakthrough in two decades-old mystery
dailyNews.description: For families of the victims, the arrest offers a measure of hope after decades of unanswered questions. However, with many cases still unsolved, authorities say the broader mystery of the Texas Killing Fields is far from fully resolved.

dailyNews.title: Trump-backed wife of RNC chair launches bid for Congress as GOP defends slim House majority
dailyNews.description: Sydney Gruters, backed by Trump's endorsement, launches her congressional bid to succeed retiring Rep. Vern Buchanan in Florida's 16th District.

dailyNews.title: Pam Bondi already fired as attorney general, Cabinet official teed up as replacement: sources
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump reportedly fired Attorney General Pam Bondi and is considering replacing her with EPA Director Lee Zeldin, sources familiar with the matter say.

dailyNews.title: Schumer, Jeffries sue Trump, accuse him of trying to 'rig' mail-in voting
dailyNews.description: Congressional Democrats sue to block Trump's sweeping election order, arguing it overrides states' authority and risks disenfranchising millions of voters.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices rise after Trump insists the Iran war is going to plan
dailyNews.description: One market analyst says Trump warning the Iran war will take 2-3 more weeks, without a plan to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, "was far less than" investors had hoped for.

dailyNews.title: Iran's violent response to Trump's address
dailyNews.description: Iran launched fresh attacks overnight as a response to President Trump's address on the war. CBS News' Holly Williams reports.

dailyNews.title: Keir Starmer on Iran: "This is not our war"
dailyNews.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer is reacting to President Trump's harsh comments on U.S. allies not helping at the Strait of Hormuz as the conflict in the Middle East widens. CBS News' Courtney Kealy has more.

dailyNews.title: Trump fires Bondi as attorney general, installs Blanche as acting AG
dailyNews.description: President Trump has ousted Pam Bondi as attorney general, saying she will be taking a job in the private sector.

dailyNews.title: What happens with the Jeffrey Epstein files after Pam Bondi's firing?
dailyNews.description: President Trump has fired Attorney General Pam Bondi and picked Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche to be acting AG. Former federal prosecutor Scott Fredericksen joins CBS News to discuss Blanche and the fate of the Jeffrey Epstein files in the wake of Bondi's firing.

dailyNews.title: Stocks slide after Trump vows to continue Iran strikes
dailyNews.description: Stocks retreated Thursday after investors were left unsettled by President Trump's Wednesday night speech.

dailyNews.title: What to know about new acting AG Todd Blanche after Pam Bondi's firing
dailyNews.description: Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche will serve as acting attorney general after President Trump announced his firing of Attorney General Pam Bondi on Thursday. CBS News' Nicole Sganga has more.

dailyNews.title: Early details on Trump's firing of AG Pam Bondi
dailyNews.description: President Trump announced Thursday that he's firing Attorney General Pam Bondi. CBS News' Shanelle Kaul, Nancy Cordes and Jake Rosen have more.
